name: Crockpot Stuffed Turkey Breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine melted margarine, chopped onion, celery, bacon croutons, chicken bouillon, parsley, and poultry seasonings.
2. Cut the turkey breast into thin slices from the breastbone to the ribcage, leaving slices attached to the bone.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the turkey slices.
4. Soak a cheesecloth (about 24x36 inches) in white wine or water.
5. Place one turkey slice on the soaked cheesecloth.
6. Fill the turkey cavity with the bread mixture, folding one end of the cheesecloth over the other to cover the meat.
7. Place the stuffed turkey breast on a metal rack inside the crockpot.
8. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours or until tender.
9. Pour additional wine (or water) over the turkey while cooking.
10. Remove from the crockpot and take off the cheesecloth immediately.
11. If desired, brown the turkey breast in a preheated oven at 400°F for 15-20 minutes.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
13. Serve each person with one or more thick slices of turkey, along with dressing if desired.
